workflow.name: Search Slack for n8n templates with OpenAI tips, Google Sheets cache and weekly analytics
workflow.description:
# Slack Bot for n8n Template Search with AI Tips, Cache and Analytics

Search n8n workflow templates directly from Slack with AI-powered suggestions. Mention the bot with what you need in English, Spanish or Japanese and get matching templates plus actionable tips to improve your automation.

## Who is this for

Teams using n8n who want to find workflow templates without leaving Slack. Great for multilingual teams and onboarding new members.

## What this workflow does

- Detects user intent (search, help, or browse categories) and routes accordingly
- Extracts keywords from 200+ known services and translates 150+ Japanese business terms to English
- Checks a Google Sheets cache before calling the n8n Templates API
- Uses OpenAI (gpt-4o-mini) to generate contextual tips based on the search results and use case
- When no templates are found, the AI suggests alternative keywords and how to build the workflow from scratch
- Logs every search to Google Sheets and posts a weekly usage report to Slack

## Setup

1. Create a Slack App with `app_mentions:read` and `chat:write` scopes
2. Set Slack credentials in n8n
3. Create an HTTP Header Auth credential for OpenAI (name: `Authorization`, value: `Bearer sk-your-key`)
4. Create a Google Sheet with two tabs: `Cache` (SearchQuery, CachedResponse, ResultCount, Timestamp) and `Analytics` (Timestamp, User, Query, Keywords, ResultCount, Intent, FromCache)
5. Connect the Google Sheet in all four Sheets nodes
6. Select your Slack channel in the Trigger, Error Reply and Weekly Summary nodes
7. Activate and test with a mention

## How to customize

- Add services to `knownServices` or extend `jaToEn` for more languages
- Edit the AI system prompts to change tone or tip style
- Adjust the weekly report schedule in the Schedule Trigger node
- Replace Google Sheets cache with Redis for better performance at scale

parameters.content:
# n8n Template Search Bot for Slack (Enhanced)

A smart Slack bot that searches the official n8n template library, provides **AI-powered tips & suggestions**, caches results, and logs analytics.

### Features
- Search 200+ service names with Japanese-to-English mapping
- AI-powered tips & improvement suggestions for each query
- Google Sheets cache to avoid repeated API calls
- Analytics logging for search history
- Smart error handling with fallback suggestions
- Intent detection: search vs help vs categories

### How it works
1. **Trigger:** User @mentions the bot in Slack
2. **Intent Detection:** Classify as search, help, or categories
3. **Cache Check:** Look for recent identical searches
4. **Search:** Query the n8n Templates API
5. **AI Tips:** Generate contextual improvement suggestions
6. **Reply:** Send formatted results + tips back to Slack
7. **Log:** Save search analytics to Google Sheets

### Setup
1. Create a Slack App with `app_mentions:read` and `chat:write` scopes
2. Set your Slack credentials and OpenAI API key in n8n
3. Create a Google Sheet with two tabs: Cache (SearchQuery, CachedResponse, ResultCount, Timestamp) and Analytics (Timestamp, User, Query, Keywords, ResultCount, Intent, FromCache)
4. Configure the channel ID and Sheet ID in the nodes
5. Activate the workflow

## Trigger
Listens for `@bot` mentions in the configured Slack channel.

## Normalize, Extract & Detect Intent
Detects 200+ tool/service names, translates 150+ Japanese terms, and classifies intent (search / help / categories).

## Intent Router
Routes the message based on detected intent:
- **search** > Cache check > API > AI Tips
- **help** > Direct help response
- **categories** > Show popular categories

## Cache Layer
Checks Google Sheets for recent identical searches to avoid redundant API calls.

## Search + AI Tips
Queries the n8n Templates API, then uses OpenAI to generate contextual tips and improvement ideas based on what the user is trying to build.

## Format, Reply & Log
Formats results with tips into Slack message, replies in thread, and logs the search to Google Sheets for analytics.

## Error Handling
Catches any errors in the workflow and sends a friendly error message to the Slack thread so the user isn't left hanging.

parameters.jsCode:
const event = $input.first().json.event || $input.first().json;
const rawText = event.text || '';
const userRequest = rawText.replace(/<@[^>]+>\s*/g, '').trim();
const userId = event.user || 'unknown';

// ── Intent Detection ──
const helpPatterns = /^(help|ayuda|ヘルプ|使い方|how to use|como usar|how does|que puedo)/i;
const categoryPatterns = /^(categories|categorías|カテゴリ|list|show me|popular|trending|人気)/i;

let intent = 'search';
if (helpPatterns.test(userRequest)) intent = 'help';
else if (categoryPatterns.test(userRequest)) intent = 'categories';

// ── Known service & tool names (200+) ──
const knownServices = [
  'Claude','OpenAI','GPT','ChatGPT','GPT-4','GPT-3','Anthropic','Gemini','Bard',
  'Llama','Mistral','Cohere','Perplexity','Copilot','Midjourney','DALL-E','Stable Diffusion',
  'Hugging Face','LangChain','Pinecone','Weaviate','Qdrant','ChromaDB',
  'LINE','Slack','Discord','Telegram','WhatsApp','Messenger','WeChat',
  'Microsoft Teams','Teams','Zoom','Webex','Google Chat','Mattermost','Rocket.Chat',
  'Gmail','Outlook','Yahoo Mail','SendGrid','Mailchimp','Mailgun','Postmark',
  'Amazon SES','SMTP','IMAP','Sendinblue','ConvertKit','ActiveCampaign',
  'Google Sheets','Excel','Airtable','Notion','Coda','Smartsheet',
  'MySQL','PostgreSQL','Postgres','MongoDB','Redis','SQLite','MariaDB',
  'Supabase','Firebase','Firestore','DynamoDB','Fauna','PlanetScale','Neon',
  'Snowflake','BigQuery','Redshift','Elasticsearch','Algolia','Meilisearch',
  'Salesforce','HubSpot','Pipedrive','Zoho','Zendesk','Freshdesk','Intercom',
  'Monday','Close','Copper','Insightly','Keap','Agile CRM',
  'Jira','Trello','Asana','Basecamp','ClickUp','Linear','Todoist',
  'Monday.com','Wrike','Teamwork','Shortcut','Height','Hive',
  'GitHub','GitLab','Bitbucket','Jenkins','CircleCI','Travis CI',
  'Docker','Kubernetes','Terraform','Ansible','Vercel','Netlify','Heroku',
  'Sentry','Datadog','New Relic','PagerDuty','Opsgenie','Grafana','Prometheus',
  'AWS','Amazon','S3','Lambda','EC2','SQS','SNS','CloudWatch',
  'Azure','Google Cloud','GCP','Cloud Functions','Cloud Run',
  'Cloudflare','DigitalOcean','Linode','Vultr',
  'Shopify','WooCommerce','Magento','BigCommerce','Squarespace',
  'Stripe','PayPal','Square','Braintree','Adyen','Razorpay','Paddle',
  'Twitter','X','Facebook','Instagram','LinkedIn','TikTok','YouTube',
  'Pinterest','Reddit','Threads','Mastodon','Bluesky',
  'Google Ads','Facebook Ads','Google Analytics','Mixpanel','Amplitude','Segment',
  'Buffer','Hootsuite','Sprout Social','Later','Canva',
  'Google Drive','Dropbox','OneDrive','Box','iCloud',
  'Google Docs','Microsoft Word','Confluence','Slite',
  'DocuSign','HelloSign','PandaDoc','Adobe Sign',
  'Google Meet','Whereby','Loom','Vidyard','Vimeo','Wistia','Mux',
  'Google Calendar','Outlook Calendar','Calendly','Cal.com','Acuity',
  'Doodle','SavvyCal','Reclaim',
  'Google Forms','Typeform','JotForm','Tally','SurveyMonkey',
  'QuickBooks','Xero','FreshBooks','Wave','Zoho Books',
  'Harvest','Toggl','Clockify',
  'Workday','BambooHR','Gusto','Rippling','Deel',
  'Greenhouse','Lever','Workable','Breezy HR','JazzHR',
  'Zapier','Make','Integromat','IFTTT','Workato','Tray.io',
  'Twilio','Vonage','Plivo','MessageBird',
  'Webflow','WordPress','Ghost','Contentful','Strapi','Sanity',
  'Figma','Sketch','Adobe XD','InVision','Framer',
  'RSS','Webhook','HTTP','API','REST','GraphQL','gRPC',
  'Cron','Schedule','Timer','Trigger',
  'PDF','CSV','JSON','XML','YAML','Markdown',
  'OCR','QR','Barcode','Image','Video','Audio',
  'AI','Bot','Chatbot','Automation','Workflow','RPA','Scraping'
];

// ── Japanese-to-English keyword mapping (150+) ──
const jaToEn = {
  '請求書':'invoice billing','見積書':'quote estimate','契約書':'contract agreement',
  '領収書':'receipt','納品書':'delivery slip','発注書':'purchase order',
  '報告書':'report','議事録':'meeting minutes notes','提案書':'proposal',
  '企画書':'proposal plan','仕様書':'specification','マニュアル':'manual documentation',
  '申請書':'application form','稟議':'approval workflow','経費':'expense',
  '顧客':'customer client CRM','売上':'sales revenue','在庫':'inventory stock',
  '予約':'booking reservation appointment','注文':'order purchase',
  '問い合わせ':'inquiry contact support ticket','サポート':'support helpdesk',
  'リード':'lead prospect','商談':'deal opportunity sales','タスク':'task todo',
  'プロジェクト':'project','スケジュール':'schedule calendar','進捗':'progress status',
  '案件':'deal project case','見込み客':'prospect lead','受注':'order received',
  '発注':'purchase order','入金':'payment received','出金':'payment expense',
  '自動化':'automation automate','連携':'integration connect sync',
  '同期':'sync synchronize','通知':'notification alert notify',
  '送信':'send post','受信':'receive get','転送':'forward',
  '作成':'create generate new','更新':'update edit modify','削除':'delete remove',
  '取得':'fetch get retrieve','変換':'convert transform','抽出':'extract parse',
  '集計':'aggregate sum total','分析':'analyze analytics','要約':'summarize summary',
  '翻訳':'translate translation','承認':'approve approval workflow',
  'バックアップ':'backup','コピー':'copy duplicate','移動':'move transfer',
  'インポート':'import','エクスポート':'export','ダウンロード':'download',
  'アップロード':'upload','検索':'search find','フィルター':'filter',
  '並べ替え':'sort order','グループ化':'group aggregate',
  'メール':'email mail','チャット':'chat message','ボット':'bot chatbot',
  'メッセージ':'message notification','返信':'reply response',
  'フォーム':'form','アンケート':'survey questionnaire','フィードバック':'feedback',
  '問合せ':'contact inquiry','お知らせ':'announcement notification',
  'リマインド':'reminder notification','フォローアップ':'followup',
  'スプレッドシート':'spreadsheet Google Sheets','データベース':'database',
  '画像':'image photo','写真':'photo image','ファイル':'file document',
  'フォルダ':'folder directory','添付':'attachment','ドキュメント':'document',
  'テーブル':'table database','レコード':'record row','カラム':'column field',
  'SNS':'social media','投稿':'post publish tweet','フォロワー':'follower',
  'いいね':'like favorite','シェア':'share retweet','コメント':'comment reply',
  'キャンペーン':'campaign marketing','ニュースレター':'newsletter email',
  'メルマガ':'newsletter email marketing','広告':'ads advertising',
  'LP':'landing page','ランディングページ':'landing page',
  '決済':'payment checkout','支払い':'payment billing','請求':'billing invoice',
  'サブスクリプション':'subscription recurring','カート':'cart checkout ecommerce',
  '商品':'product item','価格':'price','割引':'discount coupon',
  'クーポン':'coupon discount','配送':'shipping delivery','返品':'return refund',
  '勤怠':'attendance timesheet','給与':'payroll salary','採用':'recruitment hiring',
  '面接':'interview','応募':'application candidate','従業員':'employee staff',
  '休暇':'leave vacation PTO','シフト':'shift schedule',
  '会議':'meeting calendar','ミーティング':'meeting call','予定':'schedule event',
  'イベント':'event','ウェビナー':'webinar','参加者':'attendee participant',
  '招待':'invite invitation','出欠':'RSVP attendance',
  'エラー':'error bug','バグ':'bug issue','デプロイ':'deploy release',
  'リリース':'release deploy','テスト':'test QA','レビュー':'review',
  'コード':'code','プルリクエスト':'pull request PR','マージ':'merge',
  'ビルド':'build CI','アラート':'alert monitoring','監視':'monitoring',
  '天気':'weather forecast','ニュース':'news RSS feed','株価':'stock price finance',
  'カレンダー':'calendar schedule','リマインダー':'reminder notification',
  'ログ':'log record','履歴':'history log',
  '定期':'scheduled recurring cron','日次':'daily schedule','週次':'weekly',
  '月次':'monthly','レポート':'report analytics','ダッシュボード':'dashboard',
  'メニュー':'menu list options','レストラン':'restaurant food','料理':'cooking recipe food',
  '飲食':'restaurant food service','予算':'budget finance','コスト':'cost expense'
};

// ── Keyword extraction ──
const foundKeywords = new Set();
const lowerText = userRequest.toLowerCase();

for (const service of knownServices) {
  if (lowerText.includes(service.toLowerCase())) {
    foundKeywords.add(service);
  }
}

for (const [ja, en] of Object.entries(jaToEn)) {
  if (userRequest.includes(ja)) {
    en.split(' ').forEach(word => foundKeywords.add(word));
  }
}

const keywords = Array.from(foundKeywords);
const searchQuery = keywords.length > 0
  ? keywords.slice(0, 8).join(' ')
  : userRequest;

return [{
  json: {
    channel: event.channel,
    threadTs: event.thread_ts || event.ts,
    userId,
    userRequest,
    searchQuery,
    intent,
    keywordsFound: keywords,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
  }
}];

const data = $input.first().json;

const text = '*Hola! Soy el bot de busqueda de templates de n8n.*

' +
  'Puedo ayudarte a encontrar workflows pre-hechos para automatizar tu trabajo.

' +
  '*Como usarme?*
' +
  '- Menciname + lo que necesitas: `@bot Slack + Google Sheets`
' +
  '- Puedo entender nombres de servicios como Gmail, Notion, Stripe, etc.
' +
  '- Tambien entiendo japones: `@bot invoice automation`

' +
  '*Comandos especiales:*
' +
  '- `@bot categories` - Ver categorias populares
' +
  '- `@bot help` - Este mensaje

' +
  '*Ejemplos:*
' +
  '- `@bot email automation with Gmail`
' +
  '- `@bot Shopify inventory management`
' +
  '- `@bot menu para restaurante`
' +
  '- `@bot CRM lead tracking`

' +
  'Preguntame lo que necesites!';

return [{ json: { ...data, text, resultCount: 0, fromCache: false } }];

const data = $input.first().json;

const text = '*Categorias populares de templates n8n:*\n\n' +
  '*AI & LLM:* ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, AI agents\n' +
  '*Email:* Gmail automation, email parsing, newsletters\n' +
  '*Chat & Messaging:* Slack bots, Telegram, Discord\n' +
  '*Data & Spreadsheets:* Google Sheets, Airtable, databases\n' +
  '*eCommerce:* Shopify, Stripe, inventory management\n' +
  '*Social Media:* Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram posting\n' +
  '*DevOps:* GitHub, CI/CD, monitoring, alerts\n' +
  '*Project Management:* Jira, Trello, Asana, Notion\n' +
  '*CRM & Sales:* HubSpot, Salesforce, lead management\n' +
  '*Documents:* PDF generation, contracts, invoices\n\n' +
  '_Menciname con cualquier termino para buscar templates especificos._';

return [{ json: { ...data, text, resultCount: 0, fromCache: false } }];

parameters.text:
Something went wrong while processing your request. Please try again in a moment.

If the issue persists, try simpler search terms or type `@bot help` for usage tips.

user.name: Masaki Go
user.bio: I’m the CEO of HumanoiD Inc., a company that provides business process optimization and AI implementation services to organizations of all kinds.

data.details: In n8n, when a workflow execution fails, it can start another workflow. This second workflow can be any arbitrary workflow on your n8n instance. Use the Error Trigger node as your Trigger in the Error workflow.

generic.label: Creating Error Workflows in n8n

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
